question: a+2aia+2aia+2ai জটিল সংখ্যার মডুলাস 555\sqrt555 হলে a=?a=?a=?
explanation: z=a+2ai∴∣z∣=a2+(2a)2=55 \begin{aligned} z & =a+2 a i \\ \therefore|z| & =\sqrt{a^{2}+(2 a)^{2}}=5 \sqrt{5}\end{aligned} z∴∣z∣=a+2ai=a2+(2a)2=55 ⇒a2+4a2=(55)2⇒5a2=125⇒a2=25∴a=±5 (Ans.) \begin{array}{l}\Rightarrow a^{2}+4 a^{2}=(5 \sqrt{5})^{2} \\ \Rightarrow 5 a^{2}=125 \\ \Rightarrow a^{2}=25 \\ \therefore a= \pm 5 \text { (Ans.) }\end{array} ⇒a2+4a2=(55)2⇒5a2=125⇒a2=25∴a=±5 (Ans.)
subject: Math
explanationLatex: $z=a+2ai∴∣z∣=a2+(2a)2=55 \begin{aligned} z & =a+2 a i \\ \therefore|z| & =\sqrt{a^{2}+(2 a)^{2}}=5 \sqrt{5}\end{aligned} z∴∣z∣=a+2ai=a2+(2a)2=55 ⇒a2+4a2=(55)2⇒5a2=125⇒a2=25∴a=\\pm 5 (Ans.) \begin{array}{l}\Rightarrow a^{2}+4 a^{2}=(5 \sqrt{5})^{2} \\ \Rightarrow 5 a^{2}=125 \\ \Rightarrow a^{2}=25 \\ \therefore a= \pm 5 \text { (Ans.) }\end{array} ⇒a2+4a2=(55)2⇒5a2=125⇒a2=25∴a=\\pm 5 (Ans.)$

question: 3−i\sqrt{3}−i3−i এর মডুলাস কত ?
explanation: মডুলাস =x2+y2 =\sqrt{\mathrm{x}^{2}+\mathrm{y}^{2}} =x2+y2 ∴3−i এর মডুলাস =(3)2+(−1)2=4=2 \therefore \sqrt{3}-\mathrm{i} \text { এর মডুলাস }=\sqrt{(\sqrt{3})^{2}+(-1)^{2}}=\sqrt{4}=2 ∴3−i এর মডুলাস =(3)2+(−1)2=4=2
subject: Math
explanationLatex: $মডুলাস =x2+y2 =\sqrt{\mathrm{x}^{2}+\mathrm{y}^{2}} =x2+y2 ∴3−i এর মডুলাস =(3)2+(−1)2=4=2 \therefore \sqrt{3}-\mathrm{i} \text { এর মডুলাস }=\sqrt{(\sqrt{3})^{2}+(-1)^{2}}=\sqrt{4}=2 ∴3−i এর মডুলাস =(3)2+(−1)2=4=2$

question: অসমান x ও y এর যে কোন একটির বর্গ অপরটির সমান হলে সম্পর্কটি-
explanation: আমরা জানি, এককের জটিল ঘনমূলদ্বয় হনো ω \omega ω ও ω2 \omega^{2} ω2 । অর্থাৎ, একে অপরের বর্গ, তাই x ও y মূলত ω \omega ω ও ω2 \omega^{2} ω2 কেই নির্দেশ করে। আমরা জানি, ω+ω2+1=0⇒x+y+1=0∴x=−y−1 \omega+\omega^{2}+1=0 \Rightarrow x+y+1=0 \therefore x=-y-1 ω+ω2+1=0⇒x+y+1=0∴x=−y−1
subject: Math

question: 1-i মূলবিশিষ্ট দ্বিঘাত সমীকরন কোনটি?
explanation: ∴ \therefore ∴ একটি মূল 1−i 1-\mathrm{i} 1−i, তবে অপর মূল =1+i =1+\mathrm{i} =1+i ∴ \therefore ∴ নির্ণেয় দ্বিঘাত সমীকরণ, x2−(1+i+1−i)x+(1−i)(1+i)=0⇒x2−2x+(12+1)=0⇒x2−2x+2=0 \begin{aligned} & x^{2}-(1+i+1-i) x+(1-i)(1+i)=0 \\ \Rightarrow & x^{2}-2 x+\left(1^{2}+1\right)=0 \Rightarrow x^{2}-2 x+2=0 \end{aligned} ⇒x2−(1+i+1−i)x+(1−i)(1+i)=0x2−2x+(12+1)=0⇒x2−2x+2=0

subject: Math
questionLatex: $1+x2c2=0 হলে c এর মান কত?1+x^2c^2=0\ হলে\ c\ এর\ মান\ কত?1+x2c2=0 হলে c এর মান কত?$
explanationLatex: $1+x2e2=0⇒x2e2=−1⇒c2=−1x2⇒c=\\pm −1x2=\\pm 1x⋅−1=\\pm ix \begin{aligned} 1+x^{2} e^{2} & =0 \\ \Rightarrow x^{2} e^{2} & =-1 \\ \Rightarrow c^{2} & =-\frac{1}{x^{2}} \\ \Rightarrow c & = \pm \sqrt{-\frac{1}{x^{2}}} \\ & = \pm \frac{1}{x} \cdot \sqrt{-1} \\ & = \pm \frac{i}{x} \end{aligned} 1+x2e2⇒x2e2⇒c2⇒c=0=−1=−x21=\\pm −x21=\\pm x1⋅−1=\\pm xi$

question: −3+i -\sqrt{3}+i \quad −3+iএর মডুলাস ও আর্গুমেন্ট নিচের কোনটি ?
explanation: দেওয়া আছে, −3+i -\sqrt{3}+i \quad −3+i মনে করি ; rcos⁡θ=−3 r \cos \theta=-\sqrt{3} rcosθ=−3 এবং rsin⁡θ=1 r \sin \theta=1 rsinθ=1 ∴ Modulas r=(−3)2+12[∵r=x2+y2]=3+1=4=2 \begin{aligned} \therefore \quad \text { Modulas } \mathrm{r} & =\sqrt{(-\sqrt{3})^{2}+1^{2}}\left[\because \mathrm{r}=\sqrt{x^{2}+y^{2}}\right] \\ & =\sqrt{3+1}=\sqrt{4}=2 \end{aligned} ∴ Modulas r=(−3)2+12[∵r=x2+y2]=3+1=4=2 Argument θ=tan⁡−11−3,[∵θ=tan⁡−1yx]=π−tan⁡−113[∵tan⁡−1y−x=π−tan⁡−1yx]=π−π6=5π6∴−3+i=rcos⁡θ+irsin⁡θ=2(cos⁡5π6+isin⁡5π6) \begin{array}{l} \text { Argument } \theta=\tan ^{-1} \frac{1}{-\sqrt{3}},\left[\because \theta=\tan ^{-1} \frac{y}{x}\right] \\ =\pi-\tan ^{-1} \frac{1}{\sqrt{3}}\left[\because \tan ^{-1} \frac{y}{-x}=\pi-\tan ^{-1} \frac{y}{x}\right] \\ =\pi-\frac{\pi}{6}=\frac{5 \pi}{6} \\ \therefore-\sqrt{3}+i=\mathrm{r} \cos \theta+i \mathrm{r} \sin \theta \\ =2\left(\cos \frac{5 \pi}{6}+i \sin \frac{5 \pi}{6}\right) \\ \end{array} Argument θ=tan−1−31,[∵θ=tan−1xy]=π−tan−131[∵tan−1−xy=π−tan−1xy]=π−6π=65π∴−3+i=rcosθ+irsinθ=2(cos65π+isin65π) Answer:গ
subject: Math
explanationLatex: $দেওয়া আছে, −3+i -\sqrt{3}+i \quad −3+i মনে করি ; rcos⁡\\theta =−3 r \cos \theta=-\sqrt{3} rcos\\theta =−3 এবং rsin⁡\\theta =1 r \sin \theta=1 rsin\\theta =1 ∴ Modulas r=(−3)2+12[∵r=x2+y2]=3+1=4=2 \begin{aligned} \therefore \quad \text { Modulas } \mathrm{r} & =\sqrt{(-\sqrt{3})^{2}+1^{2}}\left[\because \mathrm{r}=\sqrt{x^{2}+y^{2}}\right] \\ & =\sqrt{3+1}=\sqrt{4}=2 \end{aligned} ∴ Modulas r=(−3)2+12[∵r=x2+y2]=3+1=4=2 Argument \\theta =tan⁡−11−3,[∵\\theta =tan⁡−1yx]=\\pi −tan⁡−113[∵tan⁡−1y−x=\\pi −tan⁡−1yx]=\\pi −\\pi 6=5\\pi 6∴−3+i=rcos⁡\\theta +irsin⁡\\theta =2(cos⁡5\\pi 6+isin⁡5\\pi 6) \begin{array}{l} \text { Argument } \theta=\tan ^{-1} \frac{1}{-\sqrt{3}},\left[\because \theta=\tan ^{-1} \frac{y}{x}\right] \\ =\pi-\tan ^{-1} \frac{1}{\sqrt{3}}\left[\because \tan ^{-1} \frac{y}{-x}=\pi-\tan ^{-1} \frac{y}{x}\right] \\ =\pi-\frac{\pi}{6}=\frac{5 \pi}{6} \\ \therefore-\sqrt{3}+i=\mathrm{r} \cos \theta+i \mathrm{r} \sin \theta \\ =2\left(\cos \frac{5 \pi}{6}+i \sin \frac{5 \pi}{6}\right) \\ \end{array} Argument \\theta =tan−1−31,[∵\\theta =tan−1xy]=\\pi −tan−131[∵tan−1−xy=\\pi −tan−1xy]=\\pi −6\\pi =65\\pi ∴−3+i=rcos\\theta +irsin\\theta =2(cos65\\pi +isin65\\pi ) Answer:গ$

question: 1a+i=ia−i \frac{1}{a + i} = \frac{i}{a - i} a+i1=a−ii
explanation: হলে, a এর মান - 1a+1=ia−i⇒a−i=ai+i2⇒a−ai=i+i2⇒a(1−i)=i−1⇒a=i−11−i⇒a=−(1−i)(1−i)∴a=−1 \begin{array}{rl} & \frac{1}{a+1}=\frac{i}{a-i} \\ \Rightarrow & a-i=a i+i^{2} \\ \Rightarrow & a-a i=i+i^{2} \\ \Rightarrow & a(1-i)=i-1 \\ \Rightarrow & a=\frac{i-1}{1-i} \\ \Rightarrow & a=\frac{-(1-i)}{(1-i)} \\ \therefore a & =-1\end{array} ⇒⇒⇒⇒⇒∴aa+11=a−iia−i=ai+i2a−ai=i+i2a(1−i)=i−1a=1−ii−1a=(1−i)−(1−i)=−1
subject: Math
explanationLatex: $হলে, a এর মান - 1a+1=ia−i⇒a−i=ai+i2⇒a−ai=i+i2⇒a(1−i)=i−1⇒a=i−11−i⇒a=−(1−i)(1−i)∴a=−1 \begin{array}{rl} & \frac{1}{a+1}=\frac{i}{a-i} \\ \Rightarrow & a-i=a i+i^{2} \\ \Rightarrow & a-a i=i+i^{2} \\ \Rightarrow & a(1-i)=i-1 \\ \Rightarrow & a=\frac{i-1}{1-i} \\ \Rightarrow & a=\frac{-(1-i)}{(1-i)} \\ \therefore a & =-1\end{array} ⇒⇒⇒⇒⇒∴aa+11=a−iia−i=ai+i2a−ai=i+i2a(1−i)=i−1a=1−ii−1a=(1−i)−(1−i)=−1$

question: -8-6i এর বর্গমূল কত?
explanation: Shortcut: z=x±iy হলে z এর z=x \pm i y \text { হলে } z ~~এর z=x±iy হলে z এর বর্গমুল, z=±12{r+x±ir−x}r=(−8)2+(−6)2=10 \begin{aligned} \sqrt{z} & = \pm \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\{\sqrt{r+x} \pm i \sqrt{r-x}\} \\ r & =\sqrt{(-8)^{2}+(-6)^{2}} \\ & =10 \end{aligned} zr=±21{r+x±ir−x}=(−8)2+(−6)2=10 z=±12{10−8−10+8i}=±12{2−32i}=±(1−3i) \begin{aligned} \sqrt{z} & = \pm \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\{\sqrt{10-8}-\sqrt{10+8 i}\} \\ & = \pm \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\{\sqrt{2}-3 \sqrt{2} i\} \\ & = \pm(1-3 i) \end{aligned} z=±21{10−8−10+8i}=±21{2−32i}=±(1−3i)
subject: Math
explanationLatex: $Shortcut: z=x\\pm iy হলে z এর z=x \pm i y \text { হলে } z ~~এর z=x\\pm iy হলে z এর বর্গমুল, z=\\pm 12{r+x\\pm ir−x}r=(−8)2+(−6)2=10 \begin{aligned} \sqrt{z} & = \pm \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\{\sqrt{r+x} \pm i \sqrt{r-x}\} \\ r & =\sqrt{(-8)^{2}+(-6)^{2}} \\ & =10 \end{aligned} zr=\\pm 21{r+x\\pm ir−x}=(−8)2+(−6)2=10 z=\\pm 12{10−8−10+8i}=\\pm 12{2−32i}=\\pm (1−3i) \begin{aligned} \sqrt{z} & = \pm \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\{\sqrt{10-8}-\sqrt{10+8 i}\} \\ & = \pm \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\{\sqrt{2}-3 \sqrt{2} i\} \\ & = \pm(1-3 i) \end{aligned} z=\\pm 21{10−8−10+8i}=\\pm 21{2−32i}=\\pm (1−3i)$

question: i2=−1i^2 = -1 i2=−1 হলে, i−i−1i+2i−1\frac{i -i^{-1}}{i+2i^{-1}}i+2i−1i−i−1 এর মান কত?
explanation: আবার,1i=ii2=i−1=−i\frac{1}{i}=\frac{i}{i ²}=\frac{i}{-1}=-ii1=i2i=−1i=−i প্রদত্ত রাশি=i−i−1i+2i−1=i−1ii+2i=i+ii−2i=2i−i=−2 \frac{i-i^{-1}}{i+2 i^{-1}}=\frac{i-\frac{1}{i}}{i+\frac{2}{i}}=\frac{i+i}{i-2 i}=\frac{2 i}{-i}=-2 i+2i−1i−i−1=i+i2i−i1=i−2ii+i=−i2i=−2 Ans : A.
subject: Math
explanationLatex: $আবার,1i=ii2=i−1=−i\frac{1}{i}=\frac{i}{i ²}=\frac{i}{-1}=-ii1=i2i=−1i=−i প্রদত্ত রাশি=i−i−1i+2i−1=i−1ii+2i=i+ii−2i=2i−i=−2 \frac{i-i^{-1}}{i+2 i^{-1}}=\frac{i-\frac{1}{i}}{i+\frac{2}{i}}=\frac{i+i}{i-2 i}=\frac{2 i}{-i}=-2 i+2i−1i−i−1=i+i2i−i1=i−2ii+i=−i2i=−2 Ans : A.$

question: eix এর জন্য কোনটি সত্য?e^ix\ এর\ জন্য\ কোনটি\ সত্য?eix এর জন্য কোনটি সত্য?
explanation: y=cos⁡x+isin⁡xdy=(−sin⁡x+icos⁡x)dx.=iydx⇒dyy=idx⇒∫dyy=∫idx \begin{aligned} y & =\cos x+i \sin x \\ d y & =(-\sin x+i \cos x) d x . \\ & =i y d x \\ \Rightarrow \frac{d y}{y} & =i d x \\ \Rightarrow \int \frac{d y}{y} & =\int i d x\end{aligned} ydy⇒ydy⇒∫ydy=cosx+isinx=(−sinx+icosx)dx.=iydx=idx=∫idx ln⁡y=ix+c, এখনx=0,y=1 তখন,e=0ln⁡y=ixy=eix∴eix=cos⁡x+isin⁡x \begin{aligned} \ln y & =i x+c \text {, এখন} x=0, y=1 \text { তখন}, e=0 \\ \ln y & =i x \\ y & =e^{i x} \quad \therefore e^{i x}=\cos x+i \sin x\end{aligned} lnylnyy=ix+c, এখনx=0,y=1 তখন,e=0=ix=eix∴eix=cosx+isinx
subject: Math

explanationLatex: $y=cos⁡x+isin⁡xdy=(−sin⁡x+icos⁡x)dx.=iydx⇒dyy=idx⇒∫dyy=∫idx \begin{aligned} y & =\cos x+i \sin x \\ d y & =(-\sin x+i \cos x) d x . \\ & =i y d x \\ \Rightarrow \frac{d y}{y} & =i d x \\ \Rightarrow \int \frac{d y}{y} & =\int i d x\end{aligned} ydy⇒ydy⇒∫ydy=cosx+isinx=(−sinx+icosx)dx.=iydx=idx=∫idx ln⁡y=ix+c, এখনx=0,y=1 তখন,e=0ln⁡y=ixy=eix∴eix=cos⁡x+isin⁡x \begin{aligned} \ln y & =i x+c \text {, এখন} x=0, y=1 \text { তখন}, e=0 \\ \ln y & =i x \\ y & =e^{i x} \quad \therefore e^{i x}=\cos x+i \sin x\end{aligned} lnylnyy=ix+c, এখনx=0,y=1 তখন,e=0=ix=eix∴eix=cosx+isinx$

question: √i + √-i =?
subject: Math
explanationLatex: $i=12\\times 2i=12(1+2i−1)=12(1+2\\times 1\\times i+i2)=12(1+i2)∴i=\\pm 12(1+i)−i=12\\times −2i=12(1−2i−1)=12(1−2\\times 1\\times i+i2)=12(1−i2)∴−i=\\pm 12(1−i)i+−i=\\pm 12(1+i+1−i)=\\pm 12\\times 2=\\pm 2 \begin{array}{l}i=\frac{1}{2} \times 2 i=\frac{1}{2}(1+2 i-1)=\frac{1}{2}\left(1+2 \times 1 \times i+i^{2}\right)=\frac{1}{2}\left(1+i^{2}\right) \\ \therefore \sqrt{i}= \pm \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}(1+i) \\ -i=\frac{1}{2} \times-2 i=\frac{1}{2}(1-2 i-1)=\frac{1}{2}\left(1-2 \times 1 \times i+i^{2}\right)=\frac{1}{2}\left(1-i^{2}\right) \\ \therefore \sqrt{-i}= \pm \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}(1-i) \\ \sqrt{i}+\sqrt{-i}= \pm \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}(1+i+1-i) \\ = \pm \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \times 2 \\ = \pm \sqrt{2} \\\end{array} i=21\\times 2i=21(1+2i−1)=21(1+2\\times 1\\times i+i2)=21(1+i2)∴i=\\pm 21(1+i)−i=21\\times −2i=21(1−2i−1)=21(1−2\\times 1\\times i+i2)=21(1−i2)∴−i=\\pm 21(1−i)i+−i=\\pm 21(1+i+1−i)=\\pm 21\\times 2=\\pm 2$

question: If 1a+i=ia−i;then the value of a is If\ \frac{1}{a+i}=\frac{i}{a-i};then\ the\ value\ of\ a\ is\ If a+i1=a−ii;then the value of a is
explanation: 1a+i=ia−i⇒a−i=ia+i2=a−i=−1+ai বাস্তব অংশের সহগ সমীকৃত করে, a=−1\frac{1}{a+i}=\frac{i}{a-i}\Rightarrow a-i=ia+i^2=a-i=-1+ai\ বাস্তব\ অংশের\ সহগ\ সমীকৃত\ করে,\ a=-1a+i1=a−ii⇒a−i=ia+i2=a−i=−1+ai বাস্তব অংশের সহগ সমীকৃত করে, a=−1
subject: Math

question: x+iy=p+iqr+is x+i y=\sqrt{\frac{p+i q}{r+i s}} x+iy=r+isp+iq হলে, (x2+y2)2= \left(x^{2}+y^{2}\right)^{2}= (x2+y2)2= কত?

options.a: p 2 − q 2 r 2 + s 2 r 2 +s 2 p 2 −q 2
options.b: 𝑝 2 + 𝑞 2 𝑟 2 − 𝑠 2 r 2 −s 2 p 2 +q 2
options.c: 𝑝 2 + 𝑞 2 𝑟 2 + 𝑠 2 r 2 +s 2 p 2 +q 2
options.d: 𝑝 2 − 𝑞 2 𝑟 2 − 𝑠 2 r 2 −s 2 p 2 −q 2

explanation: x+iy=p+iqr+is⇒(x+iy)(x−iy)=(p+iq)(p−iq)(r+is)(r−is) [অনুবন্ধী দ্বারা উভয়পাশে গুণ করে] \begin{array}{l}x+i y=\sqrt{\frac{p+i q}{r+i s}} \\ \Rightarrow(x+i y)(x-i y)=\sqrt{\frac{(p+i q)(p-i q)}{(r+i s)(r-i s)}}~[অনুবন্ধী ~দ্বারা ~উভয়পাশে~ গুণ~ করে] \end{array} x+iy=r+isp+iq⇒(x+iy)(x−iy)=(r+is)(r−is)(p+iq)(p−iq) [অনুবন্ধী দ্বারা উভয়পাশে গুণ করে] ⇒x2−(iy)2=p2−(iq)2r2−(is)2⇒x2+y2=p2+q2r2+s2[i2=−1)⇒(x2+y2)2=p2+q2r2+s2( বর্গ করে ) \begin{array}{l}\Rightarrow x^{2}-(i y)^{2}=\sqrt{\frac{p^{2}-(i q)^{2}}{r^{2}-(i s)^{2}}} \\ \Rightarrow x^{2}+y^{2}=\sqrt{\frac{p^{2}+q^{2}}{r^{2}+s^{2}}} \quad\left[i^{2}=-1\right) \\ \Rightarrow\left(x^{2}+y^{2}\right)^{2}=\frac{p^{2}+q^{2}}{r^{2}+s^{2}} \quad( \text { বর্গ করে })\end{array} ⇒x2−(iy)2=r2−(is)2p2−(iq)2⇒x2+y2=r2+s2p2+q2[i2=−1)⇒(x2+y2)2=r2+s2p2+q2( বর্গ করে )
subject: Math
questionLatex: $x+iy=p+iqr+is x+i y=\sqrt{\frac{p+i q}{r+i s}} x+iy=r+isp+iq হলে, (x2+y2)2= \left(x^{2}+y^{2}\right)^{2}= (x2+y2)2= কত?$
explanationLatex: $x+iy=p+iqr+is⇒(x+iy)(x−iy)=(p+iq)(p−iq)(r+is)(r−is) [অনুবন্ধী দ্বারা উভয়পাশে গুণ করে] \begin{array}{l}x+i y=\sqrt{\frac{p+i q}{r+i s}} \\ \Rightarrow(x+i y)(x-i y)=\sqrt{\frac{(p+i q)(p-i q)}{(r+i s)(r-i s)}}~[অনুবন্ধী ~দ্বারা ~উভয়পাশে~ গুণ~ করে] \end{array} x+iy=r+isp+iq⇒(x+iy)(x−iy)=(r+is)(r−is)(p+iq)(p−iq) [অনুবন্ধী দ্বারা উভয়পাশে গুণ করে] ⇒x2−(iy)2=p2−(iq)2r2−(is)2⇒x2+y2=p2+q2r2+s2[i2=−1)⇒(x2+y2)2=p2+q2r2+s2( বর্গ করে ) \begin{array}{l}\Rightarrow x^{2}-(i y)^{2}=\sqrt{\frac{p^{2}-(i q)^{2}}{r^{2}-(i s)^{2}}} \\ \Rightarrow x^{2}+y^{2}=\sqrt{\frac{p^{2}+q^{2}}{r^{2}+s^{2}}} \quad\left[i^{2}=-1\right) \\ \Rightarrow\left(x^{2}+y^{2}\right)^{2}=\frac{p^{2}+q^{2}}{r^{2}+s^{2}} \quad( \text { বর্গ করে })\end{array} ⇒x2−(iy)2=r2−(is)2p2−(iq)2⇒x2+y2=r2+s2p2+q2[i2=−1)⇒(x2+y2)2=r2+s2p2+q2( বর্গ করে )$
